WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH KEVIN IND/DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINTING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLARKSON TANYA MS. AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH KEVIN IND/DBA 2001 AUTO BODY & PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
